Metadata.title: Studi Aperti — Artists & Studios of Upper Tiber Valley
Metadata.description: Discover artists and open studios in the Upper Tiber Valley, Umbria, Italy. Browse the interactive map and find local ceramics, painting, sculpture, and more.
Metadata.ogTitle: Studi Aperti — Artists & Studios of Upper Tiber Valley
Metadata.ogDescription: Discover artists and open studios in the Upper Tiber Valley, Umbria, Italy.

Hero.title: Discover Art in the Upper Tiber Valley
Hero.subtitle: Studi Aperti is an opportunity to discover Art and Artists in their Studios in the Upper Tiber Valley and beyond. Many artists' studios are available all year round. For the months of June and July however we dust down our studios and make them visitor friendly. Scroll the map and find an artist near you or scroll the artists and find work you want to see. We look forward to meeting you.

Homepage.studiosFound: {count, plural, one {# studio} other {# studios}} found

AddListing.title: Add Your Studio
AddListing.description: List your studio or workshop on the Studi Aperti map. Your listing will be reviewed before going live.
AddListing.successMessage: Your listing has been submitted for review. An admin will approve it shortly, and it will then appear on the map.
AddListing.successReminder: Remember your 4-digit edit code to make changes later.

ManageListing.title: Manage Your Listing
ManageListing.verifyDescription: Enter your studio name or email and your 4-digit edit code to access your listing.
ManageListing.editDescription: Edit your listing below. Changes go live immediately.
ManageListing.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your listing?
ManageListing.removedMessage: Your listing has been removed from the map.

ListingForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell visitors about your studio, your art, and what they can expect...
ListingForm.editCodeDescription: Choose a 4-digit code to edit your listing later. Keep it safe!

Validation.addressRequired: Address with map location is required
Validation.imageRequired: At least one image is required
Validation.contactRequired: At least an email or phone number is required
Validation.editCodeFormat: Edit code must be exactly 4 digits

About.metaDescription: Learn about Studi Aperti, the artist directory for the Upper Tiber Valley, Umbria.
About.title: About Studi Aperti
About.whatIsBody:
Studi Aperti is an artist directory for the Upper Tiber Valley in Umbria, Italy. The site has two main features: a scrollable list of local artists and an interactive map showing studio locations.

Whether you're a visitor exploring the region or a local looking to discover new artists nearby, Studi Aperti makes it easy to find studios, view their work, and get directions.
About.eventBody:
We are organising an "Open Studio" (Studi Aperti) event running during June and July each year.

During the event, participating artists, studios, and exhibition spaces display the event poster with a QR code linking to this website. Visitors can then find artists nearby using the map, or browse artist profiles and follow directions to their studios.
About.addListingBody:
As an artist, you manage your own profile listing. Simply click the "+" button in the header, which takes you to a page where you can upload:

- Your studio or artist name and description
- Up to five images of your work or studio
- A pin on the map showing your location
- Links to your website and social media
- Contact information (email and/or phone)
- A timetable for your studio opening hours

You'll also set up a 4-digit access code. Your listing will be published once it has been briefly reviewed by an admin.
About.editListingBody: To modify your listing at any time, click the "Manage" link in the header. Enter your studio name or email along with your 4-digit access code, and you'll be able to update all of your listing details. Changes go live immediately.
About.disclaimerData: Studi Aperti, and anyone associated with the site, take no responsibility for data protection. All information is displayed by each artist at their own risk.
About.disclaimerEvent: With regard to the event itself, Studi Aperti, and anyone associated with the site, take no responsibility or liability for the work displayed by artists, the accuracy of information on the site, or the safety of participants or any member of the public visiting an artist or their studio.
About.disclaimerPurpose: This website is an open platform for the sole purpose of connecting artists with an audience and vice versa.
